name: Tier Gating (Freemium)
rules: Free tier: inquiries, events, clients, quotes, payments, basic calendar, basic finance, recipes, documents
Server actions: add await requirePro('module-slug') at the top for Pro features
Nav items: set module: 'module-slug' on the nav config entry
Admins (isAdmin()) always bypass Pro gates automatically
Every new feature must be assigned a tier and module
